{{CargoRelic
|name=Irises
|class_id=22263
|rank=SSS
|affct=ART
|birthday=05-25
|source=
|description=On May 25, 1889 AD, Van Gogh painted this canvas in the last year of his life.<br>Irises, a canvas by the famous painter Van Gogh, is known as one of his greatest works during the Saint-Remy period. Van Gogh painted this still life in the psychiatric hospital in Saint-Remy. For him, the painting was mainly a study in color. He set out to achieve a powerful color contrast. By placing the purple flowers against a yellow background, he made the decorative forms stand out even more strongly. As one of Van Gogh's masterpieces, this canvas sold for a whopping 53 million US dollars, making it one of the most expensive paintings in the world at that time.
|fame=54
|art=106
|fth=66
|civ=73
|tech=63
|ss1=Snail HP +300<br>Per 10 Maneater Pistils Used, Snail HP +30<br>Per 10 Maneater Pistils Used, Snail DEF +3<br>Maneater Pistil(s) used: 400/400
|ss2=Snail HP +400<br>Per 10 Maneater Pistils Used, Snail HP +40<br>Per 10 Maneater Pistils Used, Snail DEF +4<br>Maneater Pistil(s) used: 400/400
|ss3=Snail HP +500<br>Per 10 Maneater Pistils Used, Snail HP +50<br>Per 10 Maneater Pistils Used, Snail DEF +5<br>Maneater Pistil(s) used: 400/400
|ss4=Snail HP +700<br>Per 10 Maneater Pistils Used, Snail HP +70<br>Per 10 Maneater Pistils Used, Snail DEF +7<br>Maneater Pistil(s) used: 400/400
|ss5=Snail HP +900<br>Per 10 Maneater Pistils Used, Snail HP +90<br>Per 10 Maneater Pistils Used, Snail DEF +9<br>Maneater Pistil(s) used: 400/400
|ss6=Snail HP +1200<br>Per 10 Maneater Pistils Used, Snail HP +120<br>Per 10 Maneater Pistils Used, Snail DEF +12<br>Maneater Pistil(s) used: 400/400
|ss7=Snail HP +1200<br>Per 10 Maneater Pistils Used, Snail HP +120<br>Per 10 Maneater Pistils Used, Snail DEF +12<br>Maneater Pistil(s) used: 400/400<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Koryeo skill III.png|50px]]Place in Koryeon Museum: This Relic's ART +15
|skill2=[[File:Koryeo skill III.png|50px]]Place in Koryeon Museum: B-tad Output +3000
|skill3=[[File:Koryeo skill III.png|50px]]Place in Koryeon Museum: Medal Cost for Grandmaster Scrolls -300
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Colorful Iris|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Sunny Plant Food, +3|orange}}
|3name=White Iris|3rec=78.13M|3atk=230562|3defense=153817|3hp=13611011|3weak=30557
|4name=Yellow Iris|4rec=102.97M|4atk=282954|4defense=188770|4hp=19244794|4weak=35006
|5name=Blue Iris|5rec=132.17M|5atk=344539|5defense=229856|5hp=27079137|5weak=39561
|6name=Purple Iris|6rec=165.17M|6atk=414116|6defense=276273|6hp=36693360|6weak=46016
|Arec=203.05M|Aatk=494006|Adefense=329571|Ahp=48803623|Aweak=52491
}}}}
